\section{Industry Experience}
\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{}Y r@{}}
\textbf{Internship at Microsoft Research} & June 2018-Sep. 2018\\
\multicolumn{2}{@{}Y@{}}{\textit{Project:} Benchmarking Socrates \hfill \textit{Mentor:} Umar Farooq Minhas}\\
\multicolumn{2}{@{}Y@{}}{Socrates is a new cloud-native database that decouples computation from storage. My internship involved testing the new database architecture of Socrates in an industrial setting, understanding its performance bottlenecks, and proposing optimization opportunities.}
\end{tabularx}
